channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP senators delay immigration funding; hurricane season outlook
item.description: Republicans left for recess without passing Trump's immigration enforcement bill. Forecasters predict fewer storms this season.

item.title: Shein acquires Everlane, the millennial dream of ethical affordable luxury
item.description: Everlane's finances have struggled. The merger may alienate its shoppers or attract Shein fans to higher-end goods.

item.title: Slowing down, switching to electric, or not driving: top gas-saving strategies
item.description: With gas at $4.55 per gallon nationally ahead of a busy travel weekend, here are ways to reduce fuel costs.

item.title: Gabbard Steps Down as National Intelligence Director, Cites Husband's Cancer Diagnosis
item.description: Gabbard is the latest Cabinet official to depart the Trump administration.
